results.title: Smith, J. (2023) - Neural Networks: A Comprehensive Review
results.snippet: A review of neural network architectures by J. Smith, published in Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research, 2023.

pages.title: Citation Details: Smith 2023 Neural Networks
pages.content:
Title: Neural Networks: A Comprehensive Review
Author: Smith, Jane
Year: 2023
Journal: Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
Volume: 45
Issue: 2
Pages: 101-150
DOI: 10.1234/jair.2023.0045
Publisher: AI Research Press
Abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive review of modern neural network architectures, including convolutional networks, recurrent networks, and transformers. It discusses training techniques, regularization, and applications in computer vision and natural language processing.
